title: SQLancer query: batcalc.between undefined
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id Int32, value Float64, description String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
INSERT INTO test_table (id, value, description) VALUES (1, 10.5, 'Sample 1'), (2, 20.0, 'Sample 2'), (3, NULL, 'Sample 3');
CREATE VIEW test_view AS SELECT id, value FROM test_table WHERE value IS NOT NULL;
SELECT * FROM test_view WHERE description NOT BETWEEN 'Sample 1' AND 'Sample 2';
SELECT value FROM test_view WHERE value NOT BETWEEN 5.0 AND 10.0;
key_bug_features: BETWEEN SYMMETRIC with undefined view column
